name: Light & Wonder Inc.
analysis: LNW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$127.6400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$132.7400, stop A$111.0483, target A$174.8100 (1.94:1) — then trail it.
